About

Building real AI,
not toy projects

A CS student who skipped tutorials and went straight to shipping.

I'm Palash Mulchandani, currently pursuing B.Tech CSE at Shri Vaishnav Vidyapeeth Vishwavidyalaya (SVVV), Indore — transferred after completing first year at Woxsen University, Hyderabad. While most students are building to-do apps, I've shipped four end-to-end AI applications that are live in production.

My core focus is agentic AI — systems that don't just respond, but plan, search, retrieve context, and act autonomously. Hands-on with LangGraph, ChromaDB, RAG pipelines, Groq's LLM inference, computer vision via MediaPipe, and serverless deployments on Vercel and Render.

I design, build, debug, and deploy independently. Every project on this page went from idea to live production without a team or senior engineer. That's the standard I hold myself to.

Projects

What I've built

Four AI applications built solo. All production, no prototypes.

01 / NEXUS
Nexus
AUTONOMOUS AI RESEARCH AGENT
LIVE
Live ↗GitHub ↗

Agentic research system using LangGraph's ReAct pattern with Groq-hosted Llama 3.3 70B. Agent plans its own search strategy, queries the live web via Tavily, stores semantic memory in ChromaDB (RAG), and synthesizes structured multi-section reports. FastAPI backend with session-isolated memory; React frontend with real-time refinement and PDF export.

LangGraphRAGChromaDBGroqFastAPIReactTavilyPython
02 / PREPSENSE
PrepSense
AI INTERVIEW INTELLIGENCE PLATFORM
GITHUB
GitHub ↗

Real-time AI interview analyzer combining computer vision, speech AI, and NLP. MediaPipe (478 face landmarks) scores eye contact, posture, and expressions. Whisper handles transcription with filler word and WPM analysis. HuggingFace Transformers score answers using the STAR method. FastAPI backend with JWT auth, RBAC, dual Candidate/Interviewer modes, containerized with Docker.

MediaPipeOpenCVWhisperHuggingFaceFastAPIDockerStreamlit
03 / CALMCAMPUS
CalmCampus
AI STUDENT WELLNESS PLATFORM
LIVE
Live ↗GitHub ↗

Full-featured student wellness platform with AI counselling chat (Llama 3.3 via Groq), study planner, guided breathing, mood tracker, gamification (XP/badges/levels), and 8 ambient soundscapes synthesized live via Web Audio API. API key secured in Vercel serverless proxy — never exposed to browser. Pure Vanilla JS, no framework.

Groq APILlama 3.3Vanilla JSWeb Audio APIVercel Serverless
04 / BEYONDBOOKS
BeyondBooks
AI COLLABORATIVE LEARNING PLATFORM
TEAM PROJECT

Collaborative learning platform where students discover educational resources, engage in peer discussions, and receive AI-assisted academic support. Firebase for real-time backend (auth, database, hosting). Generative AI layer for context-aware academic Q&A. Responsive UI with real-time data sync.

HTML5CSS3JavaScriptFirebaseGenerative AI

What I'm focused on

Right now, in real time.

⚡
Building
Expanding Agentic AI Systems
Exploring multi-agent coordination patterns, tool use frameworks, and persistent memory architectures — going deeper than what's already shipped in Nexus.
🔬
Studying
Transformer Architectures & Attention
Going deep on the foundations — attention mechanisms, positional encodings, fine-tuning strategies, and how modern LLMs like Llama 3 are structured internally.
🎯
Targeting
AI / GenAI Internships 2026
Actively applying to AI engineering internship roles globally. Open to agentic AI, LLM integration, computer vision, and full-stack AI product work.
🚀
Next Project
Autonomous Desktop AI Agent
Designing an agent that sees the screen, understands context, plans multi-step tasks, and executes them — using vision models, tool use, and a planning loop inspired by recent computer-use research.
